docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2025 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $0.00 SERVED OCT-20-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BLUE WATER TOWING & ATO SERVICE INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY MONZER, AHMAD WILSON, TARYN AS TO DEFENDANT BLUE WATER TOWING & ATO SERVICE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONZER, AHMAD WILSON, TARYN AS TO DEFENDANT BLUE WATER TOWING & ATO SERVICE INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-17-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF AHMAD MONZER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BLUE WATER TOWING & AUTO SERVICE INC. IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NELSON CHICAS FILED BY DEFENDANT BLUE WATER TOWING & ATO SERVICE INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONZER, AHMAD WILSON, TARYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLUE WATER TOWING & ATO SERVICE INC. $420.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $450.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2026 ORDERED DESTROYED
